TH_YOUMU-BLOOMING_SAKURA.title: Blooming Saigyou Ayakashi
TH_YOUMU-BLOOMING_SAKURA.loss: Became a vengeful spirit beneath the cherry tree
TH_YOUMU-BLOOMING_SAKURA.pages.INITIAL.d:
As you press deeper into the tower, you come across a slowly rotating, shifting [gold]glowing hypercube[/gold] suspended in midair.

The moment you touch it, [jitter][red]searing pain[/red][/jitter] floods your body, and a distant memory rises vividly in your mind [sine]...[/sine]

[fade_in]Before you stands a [purple]cherry tree[/purple] in full bloom. Beneath it is a girl who looks [jitter]strangely similar to [purple]Lady Yuyuko[/purple][/jitter].

She clutches a small knife, hands trembling as she holds it to her throat, [jitter]as if she intends to [red]end her own life[/red][/jitter].[/fade_in]
TH_YOUMU-BLOOMING_SAKURA.pages.INITIAL.o:
Lose HP equal to [red]50%[/red] of your Max HP.
Obtain [gold]Will of Sakura[/gold].
TH_YOUMU-BLOOMING_SAKURA.pages.RUN.descr:
You rush forward, trying to stop her.

But the moment you do, an overwhelming pressure surges from the [purple]cherry tree[/purple]. You swing Roukanken with all your strength, yet only manage to sever a meaningless branch.

With a deep sigh, you return from the illusion to reality—only to find a [purple]cherry branch[/purple] in your hand.
TH_YOUMU-BLOOMING_SAKURA.pages.SEE.descr:
You watch it all as an outsider.

What has already happened cannot be changed. All you can do is accept it.

[jitter][red]But then... why does your heart hurt so much?[/red][/jitter]
TH_YOUMU-FOOD_PURCHASE.title: Ingredient Shopping
TH_YOUMU-FOOD_PURCHASE.pages.INITIAL.des:
You arrive at a town market. Vendors all around are selling fruits, vegetables, and fresh goods.

Before coming to the tower, Hakugyokurou was running low on supplies. [purple]Lady Yuyuko[/purple] also asked you to pick up some ingredients.

You decide to take care of it here and buy some food to bring back.
TH_YOUMU-FOOD_PURCHASE.pages.INITIAL.opt:
Not enough Gold.
Everyone needs at least [red]150[/red] Gold.
TH_YOUMU-FOOD_PURCHASE.pages.ONE.descrip:
You pick a stall at random and buy some food.

Yes—this is to save Hakugyokurou's funds, so [purple]Lady Yuyuko[/purple] doesn't eat the entire household budget.

Anyway, as long as [purple]Lady Yuyuko[/purple] has something to eat, she'll be happy. Ghosts don't even have taste [sine]...[/sine] probably?
TH_YOUMU-FOOD_PURCHASE.pages.INITIAL.opt:
Not enough Gold.
Everyone needs at least [red]300[/red] Gold.
TH_YOUMU-FOOD_PURCHASE.pages.THREE.descr:
You shop around and gather plenty of ingredients. It should keep [purple]Lady Yuyuko[/purple] fed for a while—

as long as she doesn't secretly snack on the ingredients while you're cooking [sine]...[/sine]
TH_YOUMU-FOOD_PURCHASE.pages.INITIAL.opt:
Not enough Gold.
Everyone needs at least [red]600[/red] Gold.
TH_YOUMU-FOOD_PURCHASE.pages.ALL.descrip:
With a grand gesture, you buy out all the nearby stalls.

It's heavy to carry, but surely even [purple]Lady Yuyuko[/purple] can't eat through all of this in a short time.
TH_YOUMU-MEET_REISEN.title: Meet Reisen
TH_YOUMU-MEET_REISEN.pages.INITIAL.descr:
On your way deeper into the tower, you enter a bamboo grove and catch sight of a [jitter]familiar figure[/jitter]. There's no mistaking it—

[jitter][fade_in][purple]Reisen[/purple][/fade_in][/jitter].

[fade_in]"Reisen~!"[/fade_in]

You call out to her. She's carrying a medicine basket, as if she's headed out to sell herbs.

[fade_in]"Huh, Youmu? Master asked me to go sell medicine. Want some? I'll give you a discount."[/fade_in]
TH_YOUMU-MEET_REISEN.pages.HEAL.descript:
"Bandages would be great. I should treat these wounds." You nod to [purple]Reisen[/purple].

"Okay! Leave it to me!" She rummages through her basket, then applies ointment to your injuries.

Before long, you feel almost completely recovered. Eientei's medicine really is reliable.
TH_YOUMU-MEET_REISEN.pages.GROWTH.descri:
"Tonics, then. I'm not badly hurt, but building up my strength is important." You nod to [purple]Reisen[/purple].

She pulls out several bottles and hands them to you.

[sine][blue]Glug glug glug[/blue][/sine].

You down them all at once, and feel renewed.
TH_YOUMU-MEET_REISEN.pages.RANDOM.descri:
"Then... just give me a few random potions. I don't need anything right now, but they'll come in handy." You nod to [purple]Reisen[/purple].

She reaches into her basket and hands you several bottles.
TH_YOUMU-FXTZ.title: Hisoutensoku
TH_YOUMU-FXTZ.pages.INITIAL.description:
Before you realize it, you find yourself in an arcade filled with cabinets and PCs—everything you could want.

People around you are completely absorbed, [jitter]shouting[/jitter] and [jitter]laughing[/jitter] in equal measure. Their excitement is contagious, and you decide to join in.

After some browsing, you pick a game that feels strangely familiar—no, the characters feel familiar: [gold][jitter]Touhou Hisoutensoku ~ Choudokyuu Ginyoru no Nazo o Oe[/jitter][/gold].

You sense you could refine a [jitter]part[/jitter] of your technique through this game. What will you focus on?
TH_YOUMU-FXTZ.pages.POWER.description: You think it over and decide your mobility still has room to improve. At high speed you can't turn as cleanly as you'd like, so you focus on enhancing your [blue]ability[/blue].
TH_YOUMU-FXTZ.pages.SKILL.description: After some thought, you decide your techniques could be sharper. The character's JA in the game is extremely powerful—you decide to learn from that [green]skill[/green].
TH_YOUMU-FXTZ.pages.ATTACK.description: In the end, you feel your offensive options are too thin. If the fight drags on, your enemy might escape—better to raise the strength of your [red]attacks[/red].
TH_YOUMU-HUNGRY_YUYUKO.title: Hungry Lady Yuyuko
TH_YOUMU-HUNGRY_YUYUKO.loss: Became a soul in Yuyuko's belly.
TH_YOUMU-HUNGRY_YUYUKO.pages.INITIAL.des:
At some point, you wander into a ruined shrine. It's completely empty—except for someone sitting where the statue should be—[fade_in]no, a ghost[/fade_in]—

It's [purple]Lady Yuyuko[/purple].

You step forward to greet her, but something about her seems [jitter]off[/jitter].

Her eyes glow [red]crimson[/red], her mind unfocused, and she murmurs at you: [jitter]"Youmu~ I'm so hungry~ Bring me something to eat!"[/jitter]

What do you do?
TH_YOUMU-HUNGRY_YUYUKO.pages.FEED.descri:
You rummage through your bag and barely manage to gather a few things that look edible.

Then you toss them all into [purple]Lady Yuyuko[/purple]'s mouth—along with a few cards you won't miss, just to help her "digest".

[sine]...[/sine] She probably won't mind, right?
TH_YOUMU-HUNGRY_YUYUKO.pages.FACE.descri:
After searching for a long while, you realize you don't have a single edible thing left.

You have no choice but to take a deep breath, grip Roukanken, and stand before [purple]Lady Yuyuko[/purple].

"Lady Yuyuko, please calm down..."

But all you get in return is a [jitter]chilling chuckle[/jitter].

The next instant, [purple]Lady Yuyuko[/purple] lunges like a starving ghost and bites the half-phantom at your side. A tearing pain shoots through your soul.

Thankfully, she comes to her senses after that bite. After apologizing, she drops a heavy bag of gold and flees the shrine as fast as she can.
TH_YOUMU-BRO_SIBLING.title: Sibling Rivalry
TH_YOUMU-BRO_SIBLING.pages.INITIAL.descr:
Before you know it, you find yourself at the edge of a cliff. Ahead, a pair of [jitter]brothers[/jitter] stand in a [red][jitter]standoff[/jitter][/red].

One, named [blue]Vergil[/blue], holds a Yamato and sits on a white street-stall chair. The other, [red]Dante[/red], stands with a greatsword in hand.

Noticing you, they both turn and ask: [fade_in]"Kid, whose side are you on?"[/fade_in]
TH_YOUMU-BRO_SIBLING.pages.SELECT_DANTE_:
[fade_in]"I choose Dante."[/fade_in]

That's what you say.

After a moment, the red demon [red]Dante[/red] points to the chair [blue]Vergil[/blue] was sitting on and says: [fade_in]"You picked me? Good choice. The chair's yours."[/fade_in].

[fade_in]"I choose Dante."[/fade_in]

That's what you say.

After a moment, [red]Dante[/red] collapses in a pool of blood. [blue]Vergil[/blue] shakes his head at you, then leaves.
TH_YOUMU-BRO_SIBLING.pages.SELECT_VERGIL:
[fade_in]"I choose Vergil."[/fade_in]

That's what you say.

After a moment, the blue demon [blue]Vergil[/blue] nods and says: [fade_in]"Choosing me will be the wisest choice you've ever made. Since you wield a sword as well, I'll share some insights."[/fade_in]

[fade_in]"I choose Vergil."[/fade_in]

That's what you say.

After a moment, [blue]Vergil[/blue] collapses in a pool of blood. [red]Dante[/red] shakes his head at you, then leaves.
